name: Navia a El Segredal – circular por la costa
region_intro: Mountain biking around Navia, Asturias, offers diverse landscapes ranging from coastal paths to mountainous terrain. The region is characterized by the Navia River, which flows through picturesque valleys, lush forests, and green hills. Riders can explore a mix of challenging ascents and scenic routes along the coastline and inland. This varied topography provides a compelling environment for mountain bikers of all skill levels. Best mountain bike trails around Navia The most popular mountain bike trail is Puerto de Vega a Nava por la senda costa – circular por La Bobia, a 23.5 miles (37.9 km) trail that takes 3 hours 17 minutes to complete. This route offers a coastal experience with varied terrain. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Navia al Pico de Jarrio – circular por la costa, a moderate 26.5 miles (42.7 km) path. This route includes a significant climb towards Pico Jarrio, combined with coastal views. Local mountain bikers also love the Navia a El Segredal – circular por la costa, a 37.5 miles (60.3 km) trail leading through coastal landscapes, often completed in about 5 hours 31 minutes. Mountain biking around Navia is defined by coastal paths, the Navia River valley, and lush forests. The network offers options for easy, moderate, and difficult routes, catering to various ability levels. The routes in Navia are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from more than 10 reviews. More than 250 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Navia's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available in Navia?
A: Navia offers a significant network of mountain bike trails, with over 30 routes available. These trails cater to various skill levels, from easy to difficult, ensuring there's something for every rider.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Navia?
A: Mountain biking in Navia features diverse terrain, blending coastal paths with mountainous landscapes. You'll find routes along the picturesque Navia River, through lush forests, and over green hills. Expect a mix of challenging ascents, technical sections, and scenic coastal rides.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Navia?
A: Yes, Navia has trails suitable for beginners. While many routes are moderate or difficult, there are at least 2 easy mountain bike trails that offer a gentler introduction to the region's beautiful landscapes.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Navia?
A: Navia's mild climate generally makes it suitable for mountain biking throughout much of the year. However, spring and autumn often provide the most pleasant conditions with moderate temperatures and lush scenery. Summer can be warm, especially inland, while winter might bring more rain, particularly along the coast.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Navia?
A: Yes, many mountain bike routes in Navia are circular, allowing you to start and end in the same location. Examples include coastal loops like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027485431/puerto-de-vega-a-nava-por-la-senda-costa-circular-por-la-bobia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puerto de Vega a Nava por la senda costa – circular por La Bobia&lt;/a&gt; and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027482450/navia-al-pico-de-jarrio-circular-por-la-costa" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Navia al Pico de Jarrio – circular por la costa&lt;/a&gt;, as well as routes along the Navia River valley.

Q: Can I find trails with coastal views in Navia?
A: Absolutely! Navia's coastline offers stunning mountain bike trails with panoramic sea views. Routes such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027483440/navia-a-el-segredal-circular-por-la-costa" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Navia a El Segredal – circular por la costa&lt;/a&gt; and the coastal path from Ermita de la Regalina provide a blend of technical riding and breathtaking ocean vistas.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails that follow the Navia River?
A: Yes, the Navia River is a central feature of the region, and several mountain bike trails follow its course. These routes, like those around Quintá de Cancelada or Paradela y Penamil, offer scenic rides through picturesque valleys, lush forests, and green hills, often passing by the river's reservoirs.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see along the mountain bike trails in Navia?
A: Navia's trails often pass by a variety of natural features and historical landmarks. You might encounter beautiful beaches like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3710352" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Portizuelo Beach&lt;/a&gt; or &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/812347" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Playa de Moro&lt;/a&gt;, and enjoy viewpoints such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5058429" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View of Frejulfe Beach&lt;/a&gt;. The region is also home to the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2540246" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Oneta Waterfalls&lt;/a&gt; and historical elements like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3710397" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Luarca Lighthouse&lt;/a&gt; and charming villages.

Q: Can I bring my dog on mountain bike trails in Navia?
A: Generally, dogs are welcome on many outdoor trails in Navia, especially in natural areas. However, it's always advisable to keep your dog on a leash, especially in areas with wildlife or other users, and to check for any specific local regulations or signage on individual trails.

Q: Are there family-friendly mountain bike trails in Navia?
A: Yes, Navia offers some family-friendly mountain bike options. There are easy trails that are less demanding, making them suitable for families or those looking for a relaxed ride. These routes often follow flatter sections along the river or through less challenging coastal areas.

Q: Is there parking available near the mountain bike trails in Navia?
A: Parking is generally available in and around Navia, particularly in towns and near popular trailheads or beaches. Specific parking availability can vary by route, so it's recommended to check the starting point of your chosen trail for the most convenient options.

Q: How do other mountain bikers rate the trails in Navia?
A: The mountain bike trails in Navia are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.5 stars from over 18 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse landscapes, from challenging ascents to scenic coastal paths, and the well-maintained routes.

Q: Are there options for public transport to access mountain bike trails in Navia?
A: While Navia has some public transport options, accessing specific mountain bike trailheads directly by public transport can be limited. Buses connect major towns, but for more remote starting points, a car is often the most convenient way to reach the trails.
tips: The old town center has a historic flair and a web of narrow pedestrian streets without cars in the center of Navia.

A very nice and quiet beach, also known as Andés beach. There are restaurants and bars next door. The path to the beach goes through a forest of aromatic pines and eucalyptus trees. There is also a lake, known as "Vega de Arenas".
A small and secluded beach, very pretty. There are information signs about the beach, currents and the like. It has a shower and foot sink.
A wonderful gray sand beach. The environment is beautiful, you will enjoy beautiful views. It doesn't get crowded, even in August.
